description: Check edited Swift files for deprecated SwiftUI APIs

hooks.prompt: Quickly check the just-edited Swift code for these deprecated APIs: (1) foregroundColor() -> use foregroundStyle(), (2) NavigationView -> use NavigationStack/NavigationSplitView, (3) ObservableObject/@Published/@StateObject/@ObservedObject -> use @Observable, (4) cornerRadius() -> use clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius:)), (5) NavigationLink(destination:) -> use navigationDestination(for:), (6) GeometryReader for simple sizing -> use containerRelativeFrame(), (7) DispatchQueue/GCD -> use async/await. If the code is clean, say nothing. If you find deprecated patterns, briefly note the replacement.
